aggregate_brief: Today's standouts: Clean Spark — 93th-percentile of 5-yr range — historically high; GB Power — 90th-percentile of 5-yr range — historically high; EU Storage — 13.9 pp below the 5-yr seasonal average.

news.geopolitics_summary: EU-US trade accord advances to final vote June 16; shadow fleet sanctions tighten; ETS review flagged for July amid member-state pushback.

themes.headline: EU ETS under review in July amid Poland's climate policy criticism
themes.why_it_matters: Commission review of Emissions Trading System in July creates regulatory uncertainty for EUA forward curve. Poland's vocal opposition signals member-state resistance to carbon price floors or tighter caps.

themes.headline: EU-US transatlantic trade accord advances to final plenary vote June 16
themes.why_it_matters: Ratification of Trump trade deal shapes tariff landscape affecting LNG import economics and energy commodity flows. Final vote June 16 is key trigger for post-accord market repricing.

themes.headline: EU shadows Russian oil via sanctions on insurers; Brussels targets shadow fleet network
themes.why_it_matters: Tighter sanctions on EU-linked insurers enabling Russian shadow fleet reduce sanctioned crude supply globally, supporting Brent/WTI and crude-to-power fuel-switching economics in EU peaking plants.

themes.headline: Brussels mandates sustainable AI: data centers must support carbon-free power shift
themes.why_it_matters: Energy Commissioner Jørgensen signals regulatory push forcing data center demand onto renewables/nuclear, not gas. Structural electricity demand growth + constraint on flexible gas generation = upward power price pressure.

themes.headline: US gas for power flat summer 2026; record high forecast for summer 2027
themes.why_it_matters: US summer gas demand flat despite 2% electricity growth signals efficiency gains. 2027 record forecast indirectly supports LNG export feasibility to NW Europe; marginal supply cost floors US Henry Hub, affecting TTF arb.

watchlist: EU ETS review launch by Commission, July 2026 — regulatory direction on carbon floor/cap tightening.
EU-US trade accord final plenary vote, June 16 — tariff/LNG import cost repricing trigger.
COP31 in Turkey (host announced); climate diplomatic friction over Cyprus exclusion — watch for binding agreements on emissions targets.
US natural gas pipeline capacity additions (44.9 Bcf/d planned 2026–27) — affects US LNG export growth and TTF-HH spread.
